meta.title: UK Student Visa 2026 — Country-by-Country Guide
meta.description: Interactive guide to the UK Student Visa with country-specific refusal rates, April 2026 UKVI updates, and scholarships for Nigeria, Bangladesh, Pakistan, India and more.

hero.title: UK Student Visa
hero.sub: A UK Student Visa is one of the most accessible and rewarding legal routes to the United Kingdom. Search your country below to see your specific situation, refusal rates, and the best strategy for a successful application.
